title: senecio banksii
intro: Senecio banksii, also known as Groundsel or Ragwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Senecio banksii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
